calendar.matters:
Petition For The Appointment Of Trustee Of The Peter Quan Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for and with Norma Ong.

Ms. Ong confirmed the representation that Peter Quan is competent to do this. The Court granted the Petition for the Appointment of Trustee of The Peter Quan Special Needs Trust (subject to review of the order). Mr. McCaffrey stated that bond is to be set at $60,000.00 which is the total amount that is in the Trust.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
